rows.item: 学習意欲・授業参加度

summary:
Students will do communicative tasks and topic-based activities to practice different language functions. In group work learners will practice pronunciation skills, listening skills and conversational techniques. Students will be encouraged to rebuild and supplement their English vocabulary and grammar knowledge, thus recognising them better as tools to speak more comfortably and at greater length about more sophisticated content than they could at the outset of the course.
The course uses a textbook. Topic-based reading, audio and video materials will be used to promote classroom speaking activities and the consolidation of grammar/vocabulary knowledge. The course text also has web-based content for autonomous learning.
Class information will be given through
1. Moodle LMS space provided by Kochi University
2. Classroom meeting

textbooks:
Speak Now Student Book Level 2
(Oxford University Press)
ISBN: 978-0-19-403016-8
https://elt.oup.com/catalogue/items/global/skills/speak_now_2/
*Each textbook has an individual access key for copyrighted online materials so it is essential that each student has their own book. Illegal photocopies of the textbook cannot be used or shared to access the online materials.
Online practice for grammar, vocabulary and listening practice using related textbook content is available at:
www.oxfordlearn.com/login
Enter the access code printed on the back inside cover of the textbook to use these online resources.
More details about this will be provided in the class Moodle space.
prep:
If the class is taught F2F detailed instructions about homework and preparation will be given in person.
If the class is taught online, detailed instructions about homework and preparation will be given through the Moodle space and Microsoft Teams.
Students should log into the Moodle space throughout the week to check homework assignments and their due dates.
In addition to completing the week’s homework assignment given in class, students should:
1. Read the relevant Moodle course section or that week.
2. Look up new vocabulary from each current section prior to class, noting it in a vocabulary book/file. Memorize new words/phrases. Practice each unit conversation and key phrases.
3. Do self-study of vocabulary and grammar between classes
4. Complete homework quizzes in the Moodle LMS.
Specific details of each week’s topic will be given as needed in the Moodle space.
teachers: ◎ トンプソン アマンダ ジェーン

extra.text: 共通教育）初年次科目／国際コミュニケーション科目基軸英語

extra.label: 履修における注意点
extra.text: １年次に必修。１外国語（英語）履修上限年間10単位。卒業にはⅠとⅡ両方が必要。

extra.label: 資格等
extra.text: 教免－省令で定める科目：外国語コミュニケーション
